title: Creativity Explored - Accessible Art San Francisco - Have Wheelchair Will Travel
content: # Creativity Explored – Accessible Art San Francisco. Most people visiting San Francisco have a list of must-see attractions. On my recent trip to San Francisco I was invited to visit the not-for-profit art center and gallery in the Mission District and I was reminded that some of the best experiences are off the usual tourist trail. Creativity Explored - accessible arts San Francisco - Have Wheelchair Will Travel. Creativity Explored was founded in 1983 by a psychologist and artist, and now supports over 130 artists with developmental disabilities. The sign out the front invites people to “Come in & make art with us.”. While sitting with the artists I noticed various people arriving, not to participate in the art session but to purchase art. Clarion Alley - Creativity Explored accessible art San Francisco - Have Wheelchair Will Travel. Creativity Explored - accessible art San Francisco Clarion Alley - Have Wheelchair Will Travel.

title: A Living Immersive Art Experience in San Francisco
content: We're hand-made, immersive, theatrical and not a museum of antiques or fine art. There are no collections, no masterpieces, no traveling
